heading: Step 1: Access the Query Profiler.
body:
- Click the name of the cluster to open the **Cluster** sidebar.

- Click **Query Insights** in the **Cluster** sidebar.

- Click the **Query Profiler** tab.

  The Query Profiler displays all your data from the log on the
  [primary](manual/reference/glossary) and [secondary](manual/reference/glossary) nodes by default.
